response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates an exceptional fit for the Senior Fullstack Developer role, with over 10 years of relevant experience, a strong technical background in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud technologies, and a proven track record of delivering end-to-end solutions. His contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and open-source projects further align with the role's requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and modern testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest).
Proven leadership in architecture decisions, scalability, and performance optimization across multiple roles.
Strong open-source contributions and AI-agent development experience, demonstrating innovation and technical depth.
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js (primary backend framework in the job description).
Some roles involved niche languages (DLang) or domains less relevant to this position.
German language skills are basic, which may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based team.

key_factors.factor: Experience with AI and automation tooling
